reviews.review_description: I have finished the game, and did all the quests I would love it if there were new maps, I have an oculus go
It's fun but you need more challenges and stuff. I already finished this game in one afternoon.  More places to fish would be nice too.

developer_response.body: Thank you for letting us know what you think! Hopefully we can release more content in the future. :)

reviews.review_description: Very boring.

I hate fishing in RL, because I never catch anything, but this game keeps you interested and the fish names are funny. It does need more content, though. I blew through the whole story in one session and now I've caught every fish, even with the paid content. I want more to do!

Best vertial reality game ever.
But it is too short

reviews.review_title: So much fun and great graphics
reviews.review_description: I’m really enjoying this game. Very relaxing and fun.
I was blown away by this game.  Everything looks so good, and it's a lot of fun.  It' s like living in a very relaxing but fun cartoon :-).  I would buy anything these devs care to make.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! <3 You can find all of our released games on our website: https://www.resolutiongames.com/games

reviews.review_description: Love the graphics, nice peaceful game until you catch a fish with a bit if fight in it lol
Was offered an expansion to the game for 3 dollars but got nothing. Fun game, but don't buy anything; you won't get it and there's no one to complain to about refund.

developer_response.body: Hi there! We're sorry to hear that you didn't get the expansion pack. If you would like to get a refund, please make sure to contact Meta directly as they handle all refunds. You can find more information here: https://www.meta.com/help/orders-and-returns/returns/. Additionally, if you require any help with the game, you can send us an email at support@resolutiongames.com, and we will be happy to help you!

reviews.review_description: Now this game is nice and Relaxing. It’s fun to play but there is some in app purchasing if you want to go to another location. Overall it’s one of my favorite game to play.

reviews.review_title: Great example of what is possible
reviews.review_description:
It looks great and it plays great. It’s just very short.

I would gladly pay for a more fleshed out version. More places to fish, more challenges and upgrades would make this worth paying for. 

You should try it.

Here’s hoping they will release a longer version.

reviews.review_title: A great game for lazy afternoons
reviews.review_description: This is a relaxing game with a sense of humor and delightful design. It is perfect for rainy days or days that you are simply stuck inside for a bit. Even when you finish the storyline there is enough in the world to keep you coming back to sit by the shore a snag a few more fish.

reviews.review_title: Best game I've played so far!
reviews.review_description:
Really nice game. Great to pick up and play, really chilled, but kind of addictive too!

I completed the game and caught all fish unfortunately quickly. Would be great to have a longer story and gameplay. Would also be great to have a multiplayer element, go sit on a virtual lake and chat with a friend... Especially if I had a friend.
Awesome game, very relaxing:)
Would recommend for all ages I love and I think you will too.
Such a nice simple free game! I love it

reviews.review_title: The best game I've ever played
reviews.review_description: This game was the best I've ever played what I like is about the missions and then the 50 fish they're all different and it's just a good came and I don't even know to speed so amazing😇I feel like I'm a 👽
So good i loved this, but story goes by too quick.
Ace game. Really relaxing.
Relaxing, fun, and a great sense of space.
